# Uriel Akira Guardado Domingues

## Summary
Junior graphic designer and creative based in Braga, Portugal. Specializes in brand identity, visual design, marketing, photography, and web design. Currently interning at Boutik Studio. Available for freelance work.

## Contact
- Email: arthurkayedesign@gmail.com
- Phone: +351 933 306 456
- Portfolio: https://behance.net/akirauriel
- Location: Braga, Portugal

## Skills
Brand identity, logo design, graphic design, UI/UX, web design, photography, social media content, marketing materials, print design.

## Tools
Figma, Affinity Designer, Affinity Photo, Affinity Publisher, Photomator, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop.

## Experience
- Design Intern at Boutik Studio, Braga (Apr 2026–Present)
- Designer & Marketing for Sticky Sticks, Toastiamo, Il Centro — Italy (Jan 2026)
- Designer & Marketing for Real Tennis, Portugal (Summer 2025)
- Food & Atmosphere Photographer for Omakase Restaurant, Portugal (2024)
- Freelance Web Designer for creative studios (2023–2025)

## Languages
Portuguese (native), English (fluent)

## Availability
Open to freelance projects, internships, and junior design roles.
